TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Paumeli, title = Paumeli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paumeli} }

S.FORM: alang Paumeli ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 270 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 260 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Paumeli ga Kalatadrang ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paumeli ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paumeli ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Paumeli ga maki 1 khu skwan biru tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Paumeli ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 270 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 260 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Paumeli ga Kalatadrang ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paumeli ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paumeli ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Paumeli ga maki 1 khu skwan biru tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paumeli ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na paumeli ɣa kalata*raŋ ru *iljauljaul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ paumeli ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ paumeli ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru qalaŋ paumeli ɣa maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
